runtime_policy: repo-only; does not launch Clash95, CDB, wrappers, PowerShell, or visible windows
checklist_policy: manual DirectInput evidence is tracked separately from CDB/proxy proof; visible/manual validation requires explicit user approval; Do not launch Clash95, CDB, wrappers, PowerShell harnesses, or visible windows unless the user explicitly approves.
no_popup_operator_preference: Do not launch Clash95, CDB, wrappers, PowerShell harnesses, or visible windows unless the user explicitly approves.

items.title: Stable HD map stage menu load and held-click route
items.input_route: real mouse movement plus held left-clicks on the active desktop
items.expected_observation: startup reaches the menu, centered 640x480 menu hitboxes respond, and held clicks are not missed by DirectInput polling
items.current_cdb_evidence: dynamic-origin/menu CDB and route evidence only
items.promotion_relevance: blocks treating synthetic input proof as manual menu proof

items.title: Stable HD map edge scroll, minimap, and selection input
items.input_route: real mouse movement near map edges plus held clicks on map/minimap targets
items.expected_observation: map cursor movement, edge scrolling, minimap/action-panel clicks, and right/bottom tile selection align with the 800x600 presentation
items.current_cdb_evidence: hidden CDB/proxy map and grid-hit evidence only
items.promotion_relevance: blocks broader stable HD input promotion

items.title: Right-bottom composition validation-stage manual input
items.input_route: real mouse movement and held clicks around the recovered lower/right UI
items.expected_observation: status/action UI remains recovered while owner/action hit-tests and grid selection still respond at the expected displayed positions
items.current_cdb_evidence: right-bottom composition matrix, route timing guard, and controlled native (450,73) grid-hit proof
items.promotion_relevance: blocks promoting rightbottomcompose into the stable stage

items.title: Castle barracks centered manual input
items.input_route: real mouse movement and held clicks on centered barracks descriptors/actions
items.expected_observation: barracks descriptor and action callbacks remain reachable through the centered 80,60 presentation
items.promotion_relevance: blocks treating barracks CDB proof as real input proof

items.title: Full castle overview centered manual input
items.input_route: real mouse movement and held clicks on visible overview descriptors
items.expected_observation: visible overview commands such as 0x86, 0x63, and 0x87 respond at displayed centered coordinates without using debugger-forced state
items.current_cdb_evidence: focused overview hitbox, visible multi-hit, dormant multi-hit, and castle overview probe guard evidence
items.promotion_relevance: blocks promoting castlecenter-all into the stable stage
